_meta.note: Protocol names/descriptions are from the official Pharos Port ecosystem directory. Network params (chainId 1672, native token PROS) verified via ChainList (chainlist.org/chain/1672) and the official Pharos account. Contract addresses were verified from each protocol's LIVE app config / official docs/registry AND confirmed on-chain via eth_getCode against rpc.pharos.xyz (a non-0x result proves bytecode on mainnet). IMPORTANT: a protocol being listed in the ecosystem directory does NOT by itself prove a live mainnet contract — deploymentStatus reflects what could actually be verified. riskLevel values are category heuristics, NOT audit/TVL claims.

deploymentStatusLegend.mainnet-verified: Contract(s) confirmed deployed on Pharos mainnet (chainId 1672) via on-chain eth_getCode.
deploymentStatusLegend.address-unverified: Project appears live / is listed as active on mainnet, but no contract address could be verified on-chain (app offline, no published address, or address not exposed). Likely usable, but confirm the contract before routing capital.
deploymentStatusLegend.testnet-only: Verified deployed on a Pharos testnet only; mainnet contract map is empty / shows 'coming soon'. Do NOT route mainnet capital here yet.
deploymentStatusLegend.not-on-pharos: The protocol's own docs/app indicate it operates on other chains and not Pharos (mainnet contract not found / known address returns 0x).
deploymentStatusLegend.announced: Partnership/integration announced but no Pharos deployment evidence yet.

_meta.addressUsageRule: Only present an address as a live mainnet venue if its deploymentStatus is 'mainnet-verified'. For testnet-only / announced / not-on-pharos protocols, you MUST flag the status and not imply a live mainnet deployment.

network.name: Pharos
network.positioning: Inclusive Financial Layer 1 for RealFi. Modular parallel L1 with dual VM (EVM + WASM), deep-parallel execution, sub-second finality, built-in compliance, and cross-chain interoperability.

native.name: Pharos
native.note: Native gas coin — no ERC-20 contract.

dex.name: Faroswap
dex.description: Pharos-native DEX fueling RWA-Fi with precision and depth. Primary venue for swaps and liquidity provision.
dex.deploymentNote: Confirmed live on Pharos mainnet via the production app (faroswap.xyz, chainId 1672) and the DODO route-service API; addresses below return bytecode on-chain. (The public docs page still shows only a testnet table, which is stale — the live app is mainnet.) DODO-fork DEX; pools come from DVM/DSP/DPP factories.
dex.contractsSource: https://faroswap.xyz/swap (live app bundle) + DODO route-service api.dodoex.io chainId=1672
dex.riskNotes: Standard AMM risks: impermanent loss, slippage, smart contract risk.
dex.strategyRole: Primary mainnet DEX for swaps (e.g. USDC -> PROS for gas) and LP positions.

dex.name: Agra
dex.description: Exchange for onchain credit, built for trading and financing tokenized credit (trades Pharos-originated pALPHA consumer credit).
dex.deploymentNote: The live app (bonds.agra.gg) embeds a Pharos mainnet config (chainId 1672, defineChain with rpc.pharos.xyz) and a Seaport-based settlement deployment. (Earlier press described Agra as Ethereum-only — that is now outdated.) Settlement token is Pharos USDC.
dex.riskNotes: Credit/counterparty risk on underlying instruments, liquidity risk, smart contract risk.
dex.strategyRole: Venue for RealFi/credit exposure (tokenized credit) on Pharos mainnet.

dex.name: Bitverse
dex.description: All-in-one RWA perp DEX bringing real-world assets and U.S. stock futures onto a single AI-powered trading platform on Pharos. USDC margin.
dex.contractsNote: Full Pharos-mainnet contract suite is on-chain verified — see protocols.perps[Bitverse] for the complete list. The collateral/deposit entry point is below.
dex.riskNotes: Leverage/liquidation risk, funding-rate risk, oracle risk, high volatility.
dex.strategyRole: Growth-allocation venue for aggressive strategies. Not for stable/treasury capital.

perps.name: Bitverse
perps.description: RWA perpetual DEX with U.S. stock futures (NVDA, TSLA, CRCL...), crypto perps and an AI-powered, order-book trading engine plus a Uniswap-v4-style spot AMM. Margin in USDC.
perps.contractsSource: https://app.bitverse.zone — API /bitverse/trade-data/v1/account/balance/contractAddressList with headers CHAIN-ID:1672, TENANT-ID:PHAROSMAINNET
perps.contractsNote: Full contract suite read from the live app's Pharos-mainnet config and each address on-chain confirmed via eth_getCode on rpc.pharos.xyz (chainId 1672, bytecode present). The account contract (0xD0A8...9D2e) is the collateral/deposit entry point and also serves as the cross-chain bridge target on BSC/Polygon/Arbitrum/Merlin/OKX. The fee-recipient spotSwapFee address (0xafb7...556b) is an EOA with no bytecode and is intentionally omitted.
perps.riskNotes: Leverage and liquidation risk; only the growth bucket of aggressive profiles, with strict position sizing.
perps.strategyRole: Directional / hedging leg in aggressive strategies. Never use stable-reserve or treasury capital here.

lending.name: Morpho
lending.description: Lending protocol combining Compound/Aave-style pools with peer-to-peer matching for improved rates.
lending.contractsNote: Pharos uses a DISTINCT core address; the canonical cross-chain Morpho address (0xBBBB...FFCb) is NOT deployed on Pharos.
lending.riskNotes: Smart contract risk, liquidation risk on borrowed positions, oracle risk.
lending.strategyRole: Core conservative-yield venue: supply stablecoins to earn interest. Preferred over LP for treasury yield buckets.

lending.name: OKU
lending.description: Premier DeFi aggregator (35+ chains) offering swap and bridge routing.
lending.deploymentNote: Pharos is not listed on Oku's official deployed-contracts page as of 2026-06-05.
lending.riskNotes: Routing/integration risk; verify the underlying venue each route lands on.
lending.strategyRole: Potential best-execution router — not yet on Pharos; do not route here until deployed.

lending.name: Faroo
lending.description: Liquid staking (stPROS) and RWA yields for Pharos; built on Bifrost SLPx.
lending.deploymentNote: Re-verified 2026-06-06 by reading the live app bundle: the mainnet contract map is literally `1672:{}` (empty) and the staking UI renders 'Coming Soon'. stPROS is deployed only on Pharos Atlantic Testnet (688689) at 0xc9A0B63d91c2A808dD631d031f037944fedDaA12 (returns 0x on mainnet). Mainnet staking is NOT live yet.
lending.riskNotes: Smart contract risk, peg-deviation risk on the LST.
lending.strategyRole: Capital-efficient PROS staking once live on mainnet; flag testnet status until then.

yieldFarming.name: TermMax
yieldFarming.description: Fixed-rate digital asset lending and borrowing platform (Term Structure).
yieldFarming.riskNotes: Smart contract risk, term/duration risk, early-exit liquidity risk.
yieldFarming.strategyRole: Predictable fixed-rate yield for conservative and treasury strategies valuing rate certainty.

realfi.name: AquaFlux
realfi.description: Unlocks RWA yield and liquidity with a tri-token model (yield / principal / collateral tokens) plus a built-in Uniswap-v4-style AMM.
realfi.riskNotes: Tranche/structure risk, oracle risk, underlying-asset risk, smart contract risk.
realfi.strategyRole: Tranched RWA yield: pick a risk/return token to match the strategy's profile. Its AMM is a verified mainnet swap venue.

realfi.name: Zona
realfi.description: Deposit RWAs and unlock idle liquidity. ZonaLend is an Aave-V3-style lending market on Pharos.
realfi.contractsNote: Addresses from the live app deployment config (pharosChainId 1672), on-chain confirmed. Architecture is an Aave V3 fork.
realfi.riskNotes: Collateral valuation risk, liquidation risk, regulatory and oracle risk.
realfi.strategyRole: Unlock liquidity against RWA/collateral without selling; capital-efficiency leg for RealFi strategies.

realfi.name: R25
realfi.description: RWA infrastructure for tokenized real-asset yield (rcTokens). Hosts third-party 'Axil Consumer Credit Vaults' on Pharos: USDC-deposit vaults with economic exposure to diversified emerging-market consumer credit, curated by Axil, audited by SlowMist & BlockSec.
realfi.contractsNote: Vault receipt-token addresses read from the live R25 app (Blockchain: Pharos), each on-chain confirmed via eth_getCode on rpc.pharos.xyz (chainId 1672, bytecode present). USDC settlement, 1 USDC min deposit, 0% fees, instant minting. R25 also runs vaults on Polygon and Sui — those addresses are NOT Pharos; only the two below are.
realfi.riskNotes: Regulatory risk, oracle/IoT-data risk, underlying-asset risk, liquidity/lock-up risk (7-day or 6-month). Vaults are curated by third-party risk curators (Axil); R25 provides infrastructure only.
realfi.strategyRole: Real-asset yield with low crypto correlation, USDC-denominated. Pick the 7-day vault for flexibility or the 6-month vault for term yield.

realfi.name: Asseto
realfi.description: Tokenized fintech RWA platform; cross-chain RWA liquidity partnership with Pharos.
realfi.deploymentNote: Products announced to move to Pharos around mainnet launch; no on-chain Pharos deployment verified.
realfi.riskNotes: Regulatory risk, issuer/counterparty risk, valuation and liquidity risk.
realfi.strategyRole: Equity-like RealFi exposure (pending deployment). Flag as announced.

vaults.name: Ember
vaults.deploymentNote: Ember is live on Sui (and announced for Solana/EVM); no Pharos deployment as of 2026-06-05.
vaults.riskNotes: Strategy-contract risk, composability risk, fee drag.
vaults.strategyRole: Hands-off yield once on Pharos. Currently Sui-only — do not route Pharos capital here.

staking.name: Native PROS Staking
staking.description: Stake PROS to help secure the network and earn staking rewards.
staking.riskNotes: Slashing risk (if applicable), lock-up periods, opportunity cost.
staking.strategyRole: Base layer for any strategy holding PROS — earn yield on native holdings or the gas buffer.

staking.name: Faroo Liquid Staking
staking.deploymentNote: stPROS live on Pharos testnet (688689); mainnet 'Coming Soon'.
staking.description: Stake PROS and receive a liquid staking token (stPROS) usable across Pharos DeFi.
staking.riskNotes: Smart contract risk, peg-deviation risk on stPROS.
staking.strategyRole: Capital-efficient alternative to native staking once mainnet-live.

bridges.name: Circle CCTP V2
bridges.contractsNote: TokenMessengerV2/MessageTransmitterV2 are Circle's cross-chain-universal addresses (same on most EVM chains); the Pharos-specific identifier is CCTP domain 31.
bridges.speedNotes: Fast Transfer: seconds to minutes. Standard: 5-20 min.
bridges.strategyRole: Primary native route for bringing USDC capital onto Pharos from other chains.

bridges.name: Chainlink CCIP
bridges.strategyRole: Canonical cross-chain infrastructure on Pharos for transfers and messaging.

bridges.name: LayerZero
bridges.description: Omnichain interoperability protocol for lightweight message passing across chains.
bridges.strategyRole: General omnichain route for assets/messages not covered by CCTP or CCIP.

bridges.name: LI.FI
bridges.contractsNote: Pharos diamond differs from the common 0x1231DEB6 diamond used on most chains.
bridges.description: Bridge aggregation protocol with DEX connectivity and cross-chain messaging.
bridges.strategyRole: Best-route bridge aggregation for multi-step pipelines.

bridges.name: Jumper
bridges.deploymentNote: LI.FI-powered UI; routes through the LI.FI diamond above.
bridges.description: LI.FI-powered cross-chain swap and bridge interface aggregating liquidity across major chains.
bridges.strategyRole: User-facing cross-chain swap+bridge UI on top of LI.FI routing.

bridges.name: InterPort
bridges.deploymentNote: InterPort's own site and docs 'Supported Chains' list (77 chains) do NOT include Pharos, and its known router address returns 0x on Pharos mainnet. No evidence of a Pharos deployment despite being listed in the Pharos directory.
bridges.strategyRole: Potential pipeline route — unverified on Pharos; do not rely on it yet.

oracles.name: Chainlink
oracles.description: Oracle infrastructure powering DeFi. On Pharos it provides CCIP and Data Streams (pull-based price oracle) for tokenized RWA markets.
oracles.deploymentNote: Pharos uses Chainlink Data Streams (pull oracle), not classic on-chain Data Feed aggregators; individual feed addresses were not published as discrete contracts.
oracles.strategyRole: Reference oracle for valuing positions and assessing oracle risk of dependent protocols.

oracles.name: Supra
oracles.description: MultiVM oracle and data infrastructure (pull-based price feeds).
oracles.strategyRole: Alternative oracle source; cross-check feeds for protocols depending on price data.

governance.name: Pharos Protocol Governance
governance.description: On-chain governance for Pharos protocol decisions (proposals, voting, delegation). Confirm the active governance venue and contracts on official Pharos channels before acting.
governance.riskNotes: Governance attack risk, low-participation risk, time-sensitive proposals.
governance.strategyRole: PROS holders participate to influence decisions affecting their positions. Confirm live governance details before building a governance plan.

wallets.name: Safe
wallets.description: Smart contract wallet for secure asset management with multisig and modular access controls.
wallets.strategyRole: Recommended custody layer for treasury strategies requiring multi-sig approval.

wallets.name: Fordefi
wallets.description: Institutional MPC wallet and security platform for cross-chain interaction.
wallets.strategyRole: Institutional-grade key management for treasury and large-capital strategies.

wallets.name: TopNod
wallets.description: Self-custody wallet for managing RWA and other digital assets.

custody.name: Anchorage
custody.description: Institutional digital-asset infrastructure: custody, staking, governance, auditing, trading.
custody.strategyRole: Qualified custodian option for institutional treasury strategies.

onOffRamp.name: Alchemy Pay
onOffRamp.description: Payment provider connecting fiat and crypto.

security.name: OpenZeppelin
security.description: Crypto cybersecurity technology, audits, and contract standards.

security.name: Zellic
security.description: Blockchain security audit and consulting company.

security.name: Hypernative
security.description: Real-time protection detecting zero-day, economic, and governance threats.

security.name: ExVul Security
security.description: Smart contract and protocol audits, wallet audits, penetration testing.

security.name: TRM
security.description: Crypto compliance and risk management tools.

data.name: Pharosverse
data.description: Ecosystem hub for insights, projects, and community.

data.name: Trusta Labs
data.description: Web3 security and analytics for user reputation and risk.

identity.name: PNS
identity.description: Pharos Name Service — official domain naming for Pharos.

nft.name: Grandline
nft.description: Native platform for launching and trading NFTs on Pharos.
nft.deploymentNote: A dedicated mainnet app (app.grandline.world, labeled 'Mainnet') exists but was unreachable (Cloudflare origin DNS error) during verification, so no marketplace contract address could be confirmed on-chain.
nft.strategyRole: Venue for NFT strategy steps; pairs with an NFT mint/collection-launch action command.

strategyTypes.name: Conservative Yield
strategyTypes.description: Capital preservation with modest yield. Mostly stable reserve, small yield allocation.

strategyTypes.name: Ecosystem Onboarding
strategyTypes.description: Guided entry into Pharos: wallet setup, funding, gas prep, first safe interactions.

strategyTypes.name: Treasury Management
strategyTypes.description: Structured capital management for projects: operating reserve, yield, growth, governance.

strategyTypes.name: RealFi Exposure
strategyTypes.description: Exposure to tokenized financial products and RealFi vaults on Pharos.

strategyTypes.name: Liquidity Deployment
strategyTypes.description: Strategic liquidity provision: pool selection, concentration, IL management.

strategyTypes.name: Governance Strategy
strategyTypes.description: Governance participation: voting power assessment, proposal analysis, timing.

strategyTypes.name: Multi-Step Pipeline
strategyTypes.description: Multi-step onchain workflow: route planning, dependency mapping, fallback at each stage.

strategyTypes.name: Portfolio Rebalance
strategyTypes.description: Adjust existing positions to target allocation with minimal transaction cost.

bands.label: Very Low
bands.criteria: Audited, battle-tested, high TVL, no lock-up

bands.label: Medium
bands.criteria: Audited or partially audited, moderate TVL

bands.label: High
bands.criteria: Unaudited or new, low TVL, long lock-up

bands.label: Very High
bands.criteria: No audit, very low TVL, significant lock-up
